generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw a local emergency drill where they had to evacuate a whole neighborhood because of a simulated cyber attack on our power grid. It was chaotic, but it made me realize how unprepared most of us really are. We need to push for better civil defense programs - not just for big cities, but for regular communities like ours. It's not about fear, it's about being smart and looking out for each other. #CommunityPreparedness #NationalSecurity
